name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: At 3517 Fort Worth Hwy, Hudson Oaks, TX 76087, TitleMax Title Loans can be reached at +1 817-599-3240.
description_long:
TitleMax is a title lending company with a physical location in Memphis, TN that has been operating since February 2007. The company specializes in quick-access emergency cash solutions for consumers who own vehicles with clear titles. They operate in 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI) and serve the Memphis area with multiple locations.

The Memphis TN 9 - Summer Avenue store offers three primary financial products: vehicle title pledges (secured loans using car titles as collateral), flex lines of credit tied to title pledges, and unsecured personal lines of credit. Title pledges allow customers to borrow against their vehicle's value while continuing to drive the vehicle. The flex line of credit component lets customers withdraw funds all at once or over time up to their credit limit. Unsecured personal lines of credit are available both in-store and online for those who prefer not to use vehicle collateral.

The Summer Avenue location distinguishes itself through consistent high customer satisfaction (5.0/5 average rating with 481+ Google reviews) and staff recognition by name—particularly staff member Nicole, who appears frequently in positive reviews. The store offers bilingual services and maintains extended hours (9am-7pm most weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday). They emphasize accessibility by accepting most credit types and focusing on vehicle value and repayment ability rather than credit score alone. Same-day approval and cash distribution are core operational features.

The primary caveat is that title loans, while offering quick cash access, are secured debt instruments with competitive but unspecified rates. The website does not disclose APR ranges, fee structures, or repayment terms, making it impossible to assess affordability from public information. Customers should carefully evaluate whether using vehicle collateral aligns with their risk tolerance, as defaulting could result in vehicle loss. This product is appropriate for genuine emergencies but carries higher risk than unsecured alternatives.
address: 3517 Fort Worth Hwy, Hudson Oaks, TX 76087

company_info.headquarters: 3517 Fort Worth Hwy, Hudson Oaks, TX 76087

pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types—credit score is not the primary lending criteria
Customers keep driving their vehicle while using title as collateral
Offers flexible line-of-credit option to withdraw funds all at once or over time
Bilingual services available at Memphis location
Extended business hours (9am-7pm weekdays, open Saturdays)
High customer satisfaction rating (5.0/5 with 481+ reviews) with named staff recognition
cons: APR, fees, and repayment terms not disclosed on website—borrowers cannot assess true cost before applying
Vehicle title is used as collateral—default risk could result in loss of vehicle
Online unsecured personal loans limited to 11 states; not available nationwide
No information provided on loan amounts, typical terms, or eligibility thresholds
Title pledge requires clear vehicle title and valid government ID—excludes those without vehicle ownership
best_for: Vehicle owners facing unexpected expenses who need same-day or next-day cash
Consumers with poor or no credit history who are unable to qualify for traditional loans
Individuals who can afford to borrow against their vehicle and want to keep driving during repayment
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners with limited credit options who need emergency cash within one business day and can afford to pledge their vehicle title as collateral. The main caveat is that APR and fee information is not publicly disclosed on their website, so borrowers must contact the company directly to understand the true cost of borrowing before committing.
services: Vehicle title pledges (secured loans using car title as collateral)
Flex line of credit tied to title pledge with flexible withdrawal options
Unsecured personal lines of credit (in-store and online)
Credit checks and vehicle valuation assessments
Online account management portal for title loans
Online account management portal for personal loans
Multiple Memphis-area locations for customer access
